zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Neville於1262年10月18日出生在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素時，他的父親Robert de Neville21歲，母親Mary Fitz Randolph18歲。他於大約1282年與Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1331年4月18日在英國英格蘭達勒姆斯泰德洛普享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾可福哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Neville于1262年10月18日出生在英国達勒姆拉比 卡素时，他的父亲Robert de Neville21岁，母亲Mary Fitz Randolph18岁。他于大约1282年与Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1331年4月18日在英国英格兰達勒姆斯泰德洛普享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾可福哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Neville was born on 18 October 1262, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, his father, Robert de Neville, was 21 and his mother, Mary Fitz Randolph, was 18. He married Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering about 1282, in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 18 April 1331, in Staindrop, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Coverham, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Neville est né le 18 octobre 1262, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Neville, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mary Fitz Randolph, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering environ 1282, à Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 18 avril 1331, à Staindrop, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Coverham, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Neville è nato il il 18 ottobre 1262 nel Raby Castle, Durham, England, il suo padre, Robert de Neville, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mary Fitz Randolph, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering circa 1282, nel Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 18 aprile 1331, nel Staindrop, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Coverham, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Nevilleが1262年10月18日にイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父Robert de Nevilleは21歳，母Mary Fitz Randolphは18歳であった。約1282年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワークウオルスでEuphemia Fitzroger de Claveringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1331年4月18日にイギリスイギリスダルハムスティインドロップで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアコバーハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Staindrop, , Durham, England - Raby With: 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비 위스 케버스톤
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Neville(이)가 1262년 10월 18일 영국 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Neville(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Fitz Randolph(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1282년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 워k워스에서 Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1331년 4월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 스테인드럽에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 커버함에 묻혔다.

pt.18 October 1262–18 April 1331: 18 de outubro de 1262–18 de abril de 1331
pt.Staindrop, , Durham, England - Raby With: Raby with Keverstone, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Coverham Abbey Coverham, Richmondshire D: Coverham, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Raby Castle, Durham, England: Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Neville nasceu em 18 de outubro de 1262, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Neville, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mary Fitz Randolph, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering aproximadamente 1282, em Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de abril de 1331, em Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Coverham, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Staindrop, , Durham, England - Raby With: раби вит кивирстоун, дурам, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Neville родился 18 октября 1262 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Neville было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Fitz Randolph, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering около 1282 г. в местности варкворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 18 апреля 1331 г. в местности стеиндроп, дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности ковирам, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Neville nació el 18 de octubre de 1262, en Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Neville, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mary Fitz Randolph, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering aproximadamente 1282, en Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 18 de abril de 1331, en Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Coverham, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
